sections.paragraph: an unused root, pr. to cut off, like the Arabic جَذَمَ and جَزَمَ (whence جَزْمُ Jesm, the cutting off of a syllable); compare under the root גָּזַז. In the use of Hebrew language it is applied to the signification of cutting off, devouring, like the kindred כָּסַם, כִּרְסֵם (compare גָּזַר No. 3); whence-
